content: Phase 1 — PROJECT SCAFFOLD: Initialize Next.js 14 project with App Router, Tailwind CSS, ESLint, Prettier, session logger, .env.local, Vercel deployment.

Phase 1 scaffold complete: Created Next.js 14 app with App Router, Tailwind CSS, ESLint + Prettier, session-log.json with logger utility at /lib/logger.js, and .env.local with Supabase placeholder keys. Git repo initialized. Ready for Vercel deployment setup.
